title: CMS INDUSLAW assists Rediff on DRHP filing
description: Rediff.com India Ltd, a subsidiary of AvenuesAI Ltd, has filed a confidential draft red herring prospectus with SEBI.CMS INDUSLAW advised Rediff on this DRHP filing.The transaction team was led by Kaushik Mukherjee (Partner) and Kanika Sachdeva (Partner), with support of the team.Kaushik Mukherjee, Kanika SachdevaRediff.com, one of India’s earliest dot-com platforms, offers a variety of services including news, information, entertainment, email, and shopping. Founded in 1996 by Ajit Balakrishnan
